text.title: integration-testing Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for integration-testing as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using unittest.mock or jest.mock to replace the database in integration tests.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A mocked DB integration test proves nothing about the actual ORM query, transaction, or schema. Lint with grep: no unittest.mock imports in tests/integration/.

failure-mode.description: Spawning a new Testcontainers container per test (function scope) instead of session scope.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Container cold start is multi-second. 50 tests with function-scoped containers adds minutes to CI. Always session-scope the container, function-scope only the transaction.

failure-mode.description: Mixing TestClient (sync) with async def tests, or calling await client.get() on a sync client.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The async/sync mismatch silently skips assertions or raises obscure errors. Standardize on one client type per test suite.

failure-mode.description: Hardcoding auth tokens in test files.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tokens encode roles and claims that vary per scenario. Hardcoded tokens create invisible coupling and expire silently. Use a token-minting fixture instead.

failure-mode.description: Testing against production or a shared staging environment.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Shared environments cause tests to affect each other and real data. Every integration test must run against an isolated, disposable environment.

failure-mode.description: WireMock stubs that pass tests but drift from the real upstream API over time.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Stubs prove the stub, not the real contract. Pair with periodic Pact contract verification or scheduled real-API smoke tests.
